cooperates.cooperate_desc: More opportunity to barrage basic attack at no hindrance of crowd control. The bonus shield that makes Zilong bulkier allows a one man army fury.

counters.counter_desc: Not even a close match, when Thamuz is in his ULT duration, Zilong cannot contend on sustain battle. Unless... Zilong run :)

dominants.dominant_desc:
Early game is his trickiest phase. Luckily enough, Zilong is not left out of smoke, there are still chances to fight back even if your lane is being frozen by opposing Yu Zhong or Cici:

1. Attempt to get near to dying minion. ONLY that during the process, the opponent should have used their skills; baiting plays a huge role here - trust me no one is prudent enough to not use skill.

2. Do counter freeze lane. Zilong has an arsenal of hook-like skill, freeze the minion lane near your tower and reject any attempts made by your opponent by dragging them in your tower.

3. Use passive consecutively. Zilong now gain stack from using his skills. It would be best if you use your passive before using skills.

4. Only pluck off squishy and low-HP character. One of the biggest mistake done by many ZIlong players I see is charging in that bulky Fredrinn. Now they built DHS + critical build, talk about resentment and reparation.

Winning Side:
Just clear minion waves to boost your economy. Never freeze lane on this phase, your opponent can sill go outside despite their disadvantages.

Losing Side:
Same with the early game phase; just bait and freeze them in the tower. And if possible with your communication skill PLEASE tell your teammate to NOT CLEAR your frozen minion lane.

Honestly, if you are already full build, just go wild and charge their front rank. It will be you who will initiate and engage the team fight.

OR

If your opponent likes to play hide and ambush like a jaguar waiting for its prey to be in the vision parameter, just split push and tell them to keep hiding while you steal their turret.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Fighter Emblem perfectly pairs his intended position as a front laner; one who needs damage while sponging up some in the process. 

Swift is a must for this build to frequently activate his passive. Zilong's over-reliance on his passive to restore HP and maintain ground on the laning phase allows him to farm more without risking red-health situations.

Bargain Hunter is solid for scaling leverage. One of Zilong's weakness is his slow scaling and brittle early sustain. 90% off doesn't seem that much in game, but it really pays off during mid game.

War Cry is Zilong's foundation of damage. Given that he needs to stick to his opponent and deal continuous damage, it is only natural to consider War Cry to further amplify his damage output.

Killing Spree is a great substitute for War Cry if the user is leaning towards sustain. The bonus movement speed allows him to stick to his enemies more especially when their HP is below 30%, by which around 50% of that threshold, Zilong's damage is already increased by 30 on Physical Attack.

equips.equip_desc:
Golden Staff being prioritized hands Zilong the opportunity to unleash barrage of passive at the level of his Ultimate. This unfolds motivation to farm safely while keeping his HP healthy.

Warrior Boots/Resilience Boots can be prioritized and culled which ever you are match with. If you are still beginning to use this build, especially in ranked, I'll go Warrior Boots to wrestle that pesky Yu Zhong into my tower under his overconfidence.

Demon Hunter Sword is great with melting sustain characters. This is bread and butter when paired with his 2nd skill which ignores 15% of their defense along with his secondary passive that increases his Physical Attack by 30 on face of an opponent with 30% or lower HP.

Corrosion Scythe is great for pinning enemies to allow continuous sustain from his passive, Corrosion's passive allows a flurry of basic attack which is paired perfectly with its ability to slow down enemy allowing consistent blow to land

Rose Gold Meteor is a phenomenon with this build. Rose Gold now gives out defense in accordance to the calculated adaptive attack. This where the debate ends whether Assassin or Fighter emblem must be chosen (clearly Fighter emblem has larger physical attack benefit). The shield from its passive allows longevity which can be used as escape pod or flat out reverse the battle.


Oracle is recently overhauled to allow sustain on both attack type as suppose to magic defense focused. Oracle remedies anti-healing items that imposes problem on Zilong's recovery.

hero.hero_overview: Zilong is arguably one of the most overlooked and mocked character in the game. Although this character is in predicament with this prejudice, it still have the capabilities on par with the meta fighter thanks to the new patch. Once solely focusing on damage was now overhauled to sustain front liner.
hero.hero_strength: Strong early laning phase. Zilong now deal bone-fracturing damage that leaves your opposing EXP lane in awe. Moreover, his opponent's defenses are almost ignored thanks to his 2nd skill which opens up a compartment for a build that is not penetration relate such as Malefic Roar.
hero.hero_weakness: Scaling is hard to execute. Zilong struggles with sustaining damage in the early stages despite of his damage. His brittle appendages means he can't farm, not especially when he is the spotlight of the ganks. Even if he reach zenith, in exchange for his dominance in late game, his sustain now requires him to stick to his enemies more, which flankers likes to take advantage of.

data.recommend: This guide is sill not final, I'm expecting changes after several games. Thanks for reading.

spell.spell_desc: Vengeance covers his early sustain that stabilizes his farming routine. Vengeance is also excellent with team fight for as Zilong, that tends a brute role, soak up damage and opens an opportunity to deal back without being slain first.

data.title: Not Bunos round

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Zilong is vulnerable against heroes with crowd control skills due to his squishy HP and reliance on mobility to deal burst damage. However, Diggie ultimate skill Time Journey is the perfect counter it creates an area that purges all negative effects from allies and grants 2.5 to 3 seconds of CC immunity, along with a protective shield. This allows Zilong to dive into fights or escape dangerous situations without being locked down, fully unleashing his assassin potential.

counters.counter_desc: Zilong is inherently vulnerable to heroes with crowd control (CC) abilities, as his high mobility and burst-focused playstyle rely on being able to move freely. This is why Eudora stands out as an ideal counter for him.

Zilong is inherently vulnerable to heroes with crowd control due to his squishy frame and reliance on mobility to execute his burst damage combos. This is precisely why Saber stands out as his perfect counter Saber kit is tailored to lock down and eliminate agile, low health targets like Zilong. His skills include CC that prevents escape, and a devastating ultimate capable of finishing Zilong off in a single combo, even without heavy durability stats.

dominants.dominant_desc: Avoid solo fights in lane even if you have the chance, hold off until you've secured your core item. Zilong is extremely item-dependent; without key gear like Demon Hunter Sword (for lifesteal and damage) or Endless Battle (for stats and utility), he lacks the sustain and burst to go toe-to-toe with most lane opponents effectively.

emblems.emblem_desc: Why choose the Fighter emblem? Because modern Fighter builds focus on hybrid lifesteal, and when paired with the newly revamped Demon Hunter Zilong, this combination unlocks tremendous lifesteal potential allowing him to sustain aggressively in battles while dishing out consistent damage.

dominants.dominant_desc: At the start, you're doing well in the lane, but the main thing is to be careful and not get carried away, so as not to die from enemy ganks.

By the mid-game, you'll already have important items that will give you enough damage and survivability, and if there are no serious counters and you're not under-farmed, you shouldn't have any problems. If your team has Snowball, you'll become a monster that will be difficult to stop even with three players, but don't get too cocky.

It's not the most comfortable stage of the game if the enemy has a strong late-game pick or good defense and counterattack, but it's not that bad, because this is Zilong. You have enough damage to kill an enemy adk 1v1, the main thing is that it's not a mobile MM like Cloud. MM with anti-physical damage can be a problem, but you can use the item rebuy strategy to extend your lifespan, and then you'll have a good chance even in the late game.

emblems.emblem_desc:
The first perk is for increasing damage, especially early on. Why isn't the Penetration perk chosen? Prioritizing physical attack in emblems is done to increase defense after purchasing Golden Meteor.

The second perk is simply a good defense boost for tanks and fighters. You could prioritize a cooldown reduction for Flick or a discount, or even a movement speed boost on the river—it's all up to you.

The third perk is a very strong regeneration at any stage of the game, which greatly increases the hero's survivability. You could take Quantum Charge for mobility or Concussive Blast for aggressive play, but the perk I chose has proven more consistent.

equips.equip_desc: This is a hybrid build that maintains a balance between high damage and decent survivability. The last two items are chosen entirely situationally, as are all defensive items in general. Immortality can be picked up in the late game and re-bought for freezing.

A more aggressive variant of the first build, the Brute Force Breastplate doesn't offer as much defense as other defensive items, but it does provide a noticeable boost to attack, movement speed, and CC, as well as a small boost to cooldown reduction. You can build this item after Meteor on Snowball, when your power is significantly superior to that of your enemies and when the enemies don't have very strong burst damage to blow you up like a balloon.

hero.hero_overview: Zilong, a melee hero who primarily uses auto attacks and is typically a squishy assassin with explosive damage, but in this build variation, I suggest using Zilong as a bruiser with high HP regeneration, similar to Tamuz's regeneration, but with significantly greater mobility and the ability to control enemies by throwing them. This build is not serious and is more of a suggestion to look at the hero from a different angle, because the hero is a fighter and has a decent defense bonus, which allows him to withstand a lot of damage with defensive items, and due to changes to some items, Zilong can gain a lot of defense.
hero.hero_strength:
Despite the fact that many underestimate this hero, after being buffed, Zilong has become a dangerous enemy on the Lane and has almost no opponents who can withstand his attacks head-on, making Zilong not the worst hero at the beginning. 

In this build, the hero will have enough defense, high HP regeneration, and resistance against heroes who deal sustained damage and cannot deal much single-hit damage.
hero.hero_weakness: Zilong's main weakness is his vulnerability to control, very high single-target damage, and high mobility, which can outpace Zilong's own mobility, as well as any other issues that may prevent Zilong from attacking the enemy.

spell.spell_desc:
Flick is the most powerful and versatile spell in the game. It can be used to run away, chase, combine Flick with hero skills, and dodge enemy attacks.

On Zilong, Flick can be used to pull enemies to allies from a distance, but Flick's other functions remain the same.

hero.hero_overview: Zilong is a fighter/assassin hero in Mobile Legends known for his high mobility, strong single-target burst, and split-pushing power, making him a dangerous pick-off specialist and tower destroyer, especially when snowballing early.
hero.hero_strength: Zilong is a fast, high-damage fighter/assassin with strong early game, high mobility, and excellent split-push and pick-off potential.
hero.hero_weakness: CC

spell.spell_desc: They improve their basic attack Ang additional attack speed

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Zilong can counter yin in his ult by using the ult and escape from his range.
Zilong can counter her in early and mid game because his second and first skills.
Zilong can counter him easily by starting with sea halberd and being aggressive with him in early game.
Balmond is very weak in early and mid game against zilong.

Zilong can counter him in early and mid game but in late game you will depend on your team to push him away in his ult.
Use the first build against him.

counters.counter_desc: Yuzhong now is counter to zilong due to his last buff.

Terizla is scary counter to zilong in mid and late game.
But you can counter him in early and mid game by starting with berserker's fury.
(Use third build)
He is good counter to zilong.
Lucas can counter him with vengeance spell.
Belerick can easily finish him.
Gatot can finish him easly.

dominants.dominant_desc:
In my opinion zilong is one of strongest fighters in the early game then start the game aggressive and try to take the first blood but beware of ganks when the first turtle time come or before it by short time.
When you reach level 7 or 8 and you have destroyed the first tower in your lane start to gank in mid lane but don't be far from your lane to protect your towers.
zilong is very strong in early game but be aware against heroes like yuzhong don't fight him in early game because he have high damage and life steal in his last buff.
You can fight terezla in early game but be aware from him when he reach level 4.
In late game team fights will be hard on zilong then try to push tower or destroy the base and steal victory or try to kill the mage or marks and be focus on squishies.
Beware of stuns and cc because it is a weakness for zilong

If you play exp lane don't start with boots start with damage knife or attack speed knife.
If you play with zilong start with attack speed knife then buy the boots.
It will make you stronger in first 2 minutes.

Except if you against marksman in your lane start with boots to give you the ability to catch him.
dominants.dominant_title: Don't start the match with boots.

dominants.dominant_desc:
If you play with zilong start with second skill don't start with first skill because second skill can regenerate rapidly by killing any thing.

Except if you against dyrroth start with first skill to drag him into the range of your tower

In first fight with your opponent in the lane hide in the push near to your tower and wait for him to appear and start to attack minions in this moment attack him with second skill and try to take the first blood.

Except if you against yuzhong don't touch him in early game because he now has high life steal due to his last buff so wait for your team to help you.

And if you fight dyrroth don't touch him in early game and try to drag him with your first skill into the range of the tower.

And if you against lukas don't hide in the push in first minute so go to the minions and try to drag him to you to hit him before he hit you with the third phase of his first skill.

emblems.emblem_desc:
In my opinion zilong with fighter emblem is better than assassin emblem because it gives him high damage and survivability in the early game.
(Against non-squishy hero in your lane).

This emblem setup only if lesily against you in the lane 
(use the second build with it).
Assassin emblem will give you high speed in early game to catch her.

equips.equip_desc:
1- worrior boots: gives zilong high survivability in early game against physical damage heroes.

2- windtalker : is very important for zilong due to attack ,movement speed ,critical damage and some magical damage.

3- haas' claws: is good for attack speed after any critical damage, life steal and critical damage.

4- berserker's fury: is the most important item for zilong because it make critical damage very high with 25% critical.

5- blade of dispair: is very good item for zilong, it makes you delete any squishy hero in milliseconds and do high damage on tanky heroes.

6- sea halberd: to reduce the healing and armors effects against high lifestealing heroes or healers.

equips.equip_desc: Dengan build ini, jangan mulakan war dan jangan sesekali berada di hadapan ketika war bermula. Biarkan tim anda memulakan war dan mencari posisi yang tidak boleh terdetec oleh musuh. Target damage dealer yg berada pada bahagian belakang ketika war bermula dan manfaatkan rumput sebagai tempat untuk bersembunyi.
equips.equip_title: INSTANT KILL FOR SQUISHY ENEMY HEROES

hero.hero_overview:
Lemah di early, gila di lategame (tertakluk pada gameplay)


"HEROES NEVER FADE!"

-Zilong
hero.hero_strength: Hero ini sangat kuat untuk lock hero mage dan mm menggunakan skill ultimate dan skill keduanya. Untuk mendapatkan damage yg lebih, pastikan pasifnya aktif dan gunakan inspire untuk instant kill pada hero yg mm dan mage. Pastikan berada di tempat yg sesuai untuk menculik musuh dan jangan sesekali membiarkan musuh itu mendapat kesempatan untuk lari dan outplay anda.
hero.hero_weakness: Hampir 70% hero di mlbb boleh mengcounter dia tetapi counter sesungguhnya bagi Zilong adalah stun/CC.

data.recommend: kepada player Zilong yg ingin mencuba INSTANT KILL
